    Diners like this sushi restaurant's fresh and delicious sushi, including popular options like shrimp tempura and California rolls, and appreciate the excellent value of their all-you-can-eat option. They also highlight the welcoming atmosphere and the friendly, attentive staff.

    People also ask
    What is included on a sushi menu?
    Sushi Menu Essentials
    • Nigiri: Hand-formed sushi with a slice of raw fish over vinegared rice.
    • Sashimi: Just slices of fresh raw fish, served without rice.
    • Maki: Sushi rolls wrapped in seaweed (nori) with various fillings.
    • Temaki: Conical hand rolls made with nori filled with various ingredients.
    Mar 3, 2025
